class.name: Stormblade
class.proficiency: Strength, Charisma, Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Perception

trait.name: Stormblade
trait.text:
Stormblades blend steel with thunderous magic.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 10

feature.name: Spellcasting
feature.text:
You cast spells through battle chants.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 11

feature.name: Tempest Strike
feature.text:
As an action, you wreathe your weapon in storm energy.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 11

feature.name: Blade Path: Path of Echoes
feature.text:
Echo stormblades step between afterimages.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 12

feature.name: Echo Strike (Path of Echoes)
feature.text:
When you hit with a weapon attack, you deal 1d6 thunder damage.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 12

feature.name: Mirror Veil (Path of Echoes)
feature.text:
As a bonus action, you blur into an echoing veil until the end of your next turn. You gain a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 13

spell.name: Thunder Arc
spell.text:
A wave of thunder erupts from you. Each creature in a 30-foot cone must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 3d6 thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
At Higher Levels. The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 33

item.name: Echo Bow
item.text:
Ammo: arrow
Proficiency: martial, longbow
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 41

item.name: Stormplate
item.text:
While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 42

item.name: Potion of Echo Healing
item.text:
You regain 2d4+2 hit points when you drink this potion.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 43

item.name: Ioun Shard of Agility
item.text:
Your Dexterity score increases by 2 while this shard circles your head.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 44

item.name: Hero's Badge
item.text:
This badge keeps a strange tally of victories.
Source: Homebrew Manual (2024) p. 45
